# AI Labor and Future-of-Work Audit Checklist

- [ ] Workplace AI purpose is documented.
- [ ] Task inventory is complete.
- [ ] Automation and augmentation impacts are assessed.
- [ ] Tasks requiring protected human judgment are identified.
- [ ] Worker consultation is documented.
- [ ] Feedback loop from consultation is completed.
- [ ] Training and transition plans exist.
- [ ] Paid training time is addressed.
- [ ] Worker privacy safeguards are active.
- [ ] Monitoring burden is evaluated.
- [ ] Worker appeal pathway exists.
- [ ] Job-quality indicators are monitored.
- [ ] Productivity gains and workload changes are reviewed.
- [ ] Disparate impacts across role groups are monitored.
- [ ] Contractor and temporary worker impacts are reviewed.
- [ ] Systems affecting discipline or termination require human review.
- [ ] Gain-sharing or transition support is reviewed.
